incident: Redis cluster node failure: pool latency spike -> ECONNRESET -> ECONNREFUSED all nodes unreachable -> Redis client closed -> session lookups and cart/orders handlers returning 500s; recurring JWT near-expiry warnings as distractor

ground_truth.desc: Redis pool latency rising before connection loss
Redis cluster node refused connections, all nodes unreachable
Redis client shut down after connection failure
session data inaccessible for authenticated users
recurring benign JWT expiry warning distractor unrelated to outage
